headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, while the Colorado Rockies defeated the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Ty Madden of the Detroit Tigers, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right forearm contusion. Other players on the injured list include Ryan O'Hearn of the Pittsburgh Pirates, Jose Trevino of the Cincinnati Reds, Tommy Nance of the Toronto Blue Jays, Jake Fraley of the Tampa Bay Rays, Heliot Ramos of the San Francisco Giants, Ben Joyce of the Los Angeles Angels, and Trevor Story of the Boston Red Sox.

The Chicago White Sox made a trade, acquiring center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams, and right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. Additionally, the Athletics acquired left-handed pitcher José Suarez from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, including a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a convincing 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Ty Madden Placed on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers right-handed pitcher Ty Madden has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right forearm contusion, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The trade was completed on May 16, 2026.
